Account.description: Fetch a single account by itemId + account id, optionally including linked account metadata.
good_for: Resolve account details for a known id
Confirm account type/subtype before deeper queries

AccountLiveBalance.description: Fetch the freshest live balance snapshot for a specific account.
good_for: Compare latest value vs historical trend

Accounts.description: List accounts, optionally filtered by account type, with optional account-link info.
good_for: Discover account and item ids for later calls
Filter to investment or real-estate accounts

AggregatedHoldings.description: Return holdings aggregates for a timeframe and aggregation filter, optionally scoped to account/item.

AmountTotalMonthly.description: Return monthly total amount series for a specific account.

BalanceHistory.description: Return historical account balance points over a chosen timeframe.

CategoryKeyMetrics.description: Return key metrics for a specific category id.
good_for: Average monthly spend and total spent for one category

CategoryTotalKeyMetrics.description: Return top-level category metrics across categories.

Holdings.description: Return raw holdings positions with security and metrics fields.

Institution.description: Fetch institution metadata and provider info by institution id.

InvestmentAllocation.description: Return portfolio allocation breakdown, optionally scoped by account/item.

InvestmentBalance.description: Return investment balance time series for a timeframe.

InvestmentLiveBalance.description: Return current total investment live balance snapshot.

MostRecentTransaction.description: Fetch the newest transaction matching a filter.
good_for: Quick recency check for recurring or category-specific activity

RecurringKeyMetrics.description: Fetch recurring key metrics for a recurring id at monthly/annual granularity.
good_for: Recurring spend trend and average amount analysis

Recurrings.description: List recurring entities, optionally filtered by category.

SecurityPricesHighFrequency.description: Return high-frequency security price points for a security id/timeframe.

TopMovers.description: Return movers list based on selected mover filter.

TransactionSummary.description: Return aggregate transaction totals/counts for a filter.
good_for: Fast aggregate metrics for searches and scoped filters

Transactions.description: Return paginated transaction list using classic pagination fields.
good_for: Account detail and recurring detail transaction lists

TransactionsFeed.description: Return feed-style paginated transactions, with optional month-group nodes.
